data.description: China’s Taiwan Affairs Office states that accusations by DPP authorities of economic coercion are unfounded, following the Taiwan president’s postponed Eswatini trip.
VinFast will not shift back to ICE cars, according to Vingroup chairman.
China’s Foreign Ministry praises countries that continue to follow the One-China principle, in response to Taiwan president canceling Eswatini trip.
The chairman of Vingroup says preparations are underway for an IPO of taxi arm Green SM.

data.title: Admiral Paparo highlights Bitcoin's role in US cybersecurity, calling it a key strategic tool with proof-of-work benefits.
data.description: Admiral Samuel Paparo recently highlighted the potential of Bitcoin as a valuable strategic asset for U.S. cybersecurity and national power. He specifically emphasized the advantageous characteristics of Bitcoin's proof-of-work mechanism. Paparo's perspective underlines the significance of leveraging emerging technologies like Bitcoin to enhance security measures and bolster national strength.
Vietnam’s Vingroup chairman: VinFast aims to reach breakeven by 2027.
Piper Sandler cuts its target price on Intuitive Surgical to $580, down from $620.

data.title: Critical Link Launches World's First AI-Driven SOM Recommendation Engine, Powered by Rapidflare
data.description: In a groundbreaking collaboration, Critical Link and Rapidflare have unveiled the revolutionary AI-powered System on Module Recommendation Engine. This cutting-edge technology allows engineers to articulate their needs using simple language and swiftly obtain precise, personalized recommendations for SOMs. This innovative partnership marks the debut of the first-of-its-kind solution in the world, enabling rapid decision-making and streamlining the selection process. By leveraging advanced AI capabilities, this system facilitates quick access to tailored SOM suggestions, revolutionizing the industry.
The Taiwan Affairs Office of China claims it has again revealed attempts by certain actors to use force in the Taiwan Strait, threatening peace and stability in the region.

data.title: LTM Wins Two Google Cloud Partner of the Year Awards for 2026
data.description: In Mumbai, India, LTM recently revealed that it is honored to receive two prestigious accolades as the Google Cloud Partner of the Year for 2026. The company was recognized for its outstanding contributions and achievements in the field of artificial intelligence. This recognition highlights LTM's leadership and innovation in leveraging Google Cloud technologies.

data.title: US Navy Admiral believes Bitcoin technology is crucial for cybersecurity due to proof-of-work; calls it an instrument for US ‘power projection’.
data.description: Admiral Samuel Paparo of the US Navy noted the significance of Bitcoin's proof-of-work technology in cybersecurity, highlighting its critical computer science applications. Paparo emphasized the importance of this technology in addressing cybersecurity challenges.

data.title: Family Research Council Responds to SPLC Indictments; Says Accountability Should Include Restitution for those Harmed
data.description: In Washington on April 21, 2026, Tony Perkins, President of the Family Research Council, issued a statement regarding federal indictments against the Southern Poverty Law Center. The indictments came after a federal investigation uncovered that the SPLC had redirected millions of dollars to the Ku Klux Klan. Perkins expressed strong concern over this revelation and emphasized the need for accountability in the handling of funds by charitable organizations.
Gold spot prices gain about 1%, reaching $4,755.86/oz.
